name: adg-governance
intent: Expose deterministic governance workflows to Codex and Claude Code (and future agent clients) through the same commands, schemas, and risk classes.
runtimePolicy: This plugin does not implement an autonomous runtime. It constrains whichever runtime invokes it through bounded context, validation, evidence, and stop conditions.
sharedContract: Both adapters bind to the SAME rules: config/agentic/guardrails.json (deny-by-default risk classes), the AGENTS.md rulebook (CLAUDE.md is generated from AGENTS.md so both harnesses read identical rules), the skills/, and the commands above. Install both in one repo and they enforce one policy.

adapters.enforcement: Codex approval policy + the shared guardrails.json; commands and skills carry the same risk classes. A pre-tool hook adapter can reuse hooks/adg-guardrail-hook.mjs when Codex exposes pre-tool hooks.
Deterministic: a PreToolUse hook (hooks/adg-guardrail-hook.mjs) hard-blocks destructive commands and raw context-hazard reads, and asks on secrets / production / migration.

adapters.contract: Use this neutral manifest plus SKILL.md workflow text and deterministic command outputs.
